title: Bee Removal in Dobbs Ferry, NY | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Dobbs Ferry, Westchester. Safe, humane bee extraction from homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for $350-$550 service!
intro: Dealing with a bee infestation in Dobbs Ferry? Best Pest Control NYC provides safe, professional bee removal services for residential and commercial properties throughout this historic Westchester village. Our experienced technicians specialize in humane bee extraction, protecting both your property and these important pollinators.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Dobbs Ferry and the greater Westchester area for years with proven expertise in safe bee removal. Our licensed technicians use eco-friendly methods to relocate bee colonies while ensuring your family's safety, and we offer competitive pricing from $350 to $550 with same-day emergency service available.
localContext: From the historic homes near the Old Croton Aqueduct Trail to waterfront properties along the Hudson River and the classic residences in downtown Dobbs Ferry, bee colonies often establish themselves in chimneys, eaves, and wall voids. The village's mature trees and beautiful landscaping around areas like Waterfront Park and Gould Park create ideal habitats for bees seeking nesting sites.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Dobbs Ferry?
faqs.answer: Bee removal services in Dobbs Ferry typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the colony size, location accessibility, and extent of the infestation. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove bees from my Dobbs Ferry property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for bee removal in Dobbs Ferry. Most bee removal jobs are completed within 2-4 hours, though larger colonies or hard-to-reach locations may require additional time. We prioritize emergency situations where residents are at immediate risk.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we humanely relocate bee colonies rather than exterminating them, as bees are vital pollinators. Our trained specialists safely remove the entire hive and relocate it to a suitable environment. In rare cases where relocation isn't feasible due to safety concerns, we use targeted methods that minimize environmental impact.

faqs.question: Will bees return after removal?
faqs.answer: Our bee removal service includes thorough hive removal and treatment of the area to prevent re-infestation. We also seal entry points and provide recommendations to make your Dobbs Ferry property less attractive to future colonies. Our work comes with a service guarantee to ensure bees don't return to the same location.
